positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos.tptp
1. working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) [input(axiom)]
2. script_editor(badults,andrew_collins) [input(axiom)]
3. working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) & script_editor(badults,andrew_collins) [input(conjecture)]
4. ~(working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) & script_editor(badults,andrew_collins)) [negated conjecture 3]
5. ~working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) | ~script_editor(badults,andrew_collins) [ennf transformation 4]
6. working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) [cnf transformation 1]
7. script_editor(badults,andrew_collins) [cnf transformation 2]
8. ~working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) | ~script_editor(badults,andrew_collins) [cnf transformation 5]
10. 1 <=> script_editor(badults,andrew_collins) [avatar definition]
14. 2 <=> working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) [avatar definition]
17. ~1 | ~2 [avatar split clause 8,14,10]
18. 1 [avatar split clause 7,10]
19. 2 [avatar split clause 6,14]
s1. ~2 | ~1 [sat_conversion 17]
s2. 1 [sat_conversion 18]
s3. 2 [sat_conversion 19]
s4. # [rat s1,s2,s3]
20. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]
% SZS output end Proof for pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define working_title(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define script_editor(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
